title: Survivor Faction
description: A survivor group / faction (FR-NPC-07/10, T53 · GDD XII). Static definition only; the run seeds a SurvivorGroup into GameState.groups and a player.reputation entry at start (sim/social.seedFactions). Co-members trend friendly and `rivalries` trend hostile, seeding recruited companions' `relationships` and moving shelter morale; `homeNode` is where the faction's off-screen survivors regroup. Registering any faction turns the whole social system on (the master gate); a content set with no factions leaves it inert (byte-identical to pre-T53).

$schema.description: Optional editor hint pointing at this schema.

id.description: Stable content id of the form faction.<slug> (becomes the GroupId).

archetype.description: Identity key for prose (e.g. collective, holdout, crew, raiders) — FR-NPC-10 identity, first pass.

description.description: How the faction reads — who they are and how they hold their ground (ICU MessageFormat string).

homeNode.description: The node this faction gathers at; its off-screen survivors drift here (PL-M3-02).

goal.description: Content-defined goal key driving off-screen behaviour (reserved for diplomacy; movement uses homeNode).

members.description: Survivor ids that belong to this faction.

baseline.description: Optional starting integers seeded into the SurvivorGroup + player.reputation.

reputation.description: Player's starting standing with this faction −100..100 (default 0).

rivalries.description: Pairs of survivors (by id) who don't get along — seeds a negative bond between them, moving shelter morale when both are recruited.

notes.description: Author commentary (JSON has no comments, ADR-0002).
